AccessControlUpdated(address,uint8,bool).details: Emitted when access control is updated for an account

params.access: whether role is granted or revoked

CollateralAdded(address,uint8,address).details: Emitted when a new supported collateral is added

params.gToken: the gToken contract of the collateral
params.index: the index of the supported collateral

CollateralDisabled(uint8).details: Emitted when an existing supported collateral is disabled (can still close trades but not open new ones)

params.index: the index of the supported collateral

CollateralUpdated(uint8,bool).details: Emitted when an existing supported collateral active state is updated

params.index: the index of the supported collateral

GTokenUpdated(address,uint8,address).details: Emitted when the contracts of a supported collateral trading stack are updated

params.gToken: the gToken contract of the collateral
params.index: the index of the supported collateral

Initialized(uint8).details: Triggered when the contract has been initialized or reinitialized.

OpenOrderDetailsUpdated(address,uint32,u.details: Emitted when an existing trade/limit order/stop order is updated

PendingOrderClosed((address,uint32)).details: Emitted when a pending order is closed

params.orderId: the id of the pending order closed

PendingOrderStored(((address,uint32,uint.details: Emitted when a new pending order is stored

TradeClosed(address,uint32,bool).details: Emitted when an open trade is closed

params.isPnlPositive: true if trade pnl is positive

TradeCollateralUpdated(address,uint32,ui.details: Emitted when an open trade collateral is updated

TradeMaxClosingSlippagePUpdated(address,.details: Emitted when the max closing slippage % of an open trade is updated

params.maxClosingSlippageP: new max closing slippage % value (1e3 precision)

TradePositionUpdated(address,uint32,uint.details: Emitted when an open trade collateral is updated

params.isPnlPositive: true if trade pnl is positive (only relevant when closing)
params.newPositionSizeToken: new position size in token amount (1e18)

TradeSlUpdated(address,uint32,uint64).details: Emitted when the stop loss of an open trade is updated

TradeStored(address,uint32,(address,uint.details: Emitted when a new trade is stored

TradeTpUpdated(address,uint32,uint64).details: Emitted when the take profit of an open trade is updated

TradingActivatedUpdated(uint8).details: Emitted when the trading activated state is updated

addCollateral(address,address).details: Lists a new supported collateral (disabled by default).Important: updateCollateralGnsLiquidityPool, updateCollateralUsdPriceFeed, and toggleCollateralActiveState must be called after this function.

params._gToken: the gToken contract of the collateral

params._orderId: the id of the pending order to be closed

closeTrade((address,uint32),bool,uint64).details: Marks an open trade/limit/stop as closed

getAllPendingOrders(uint256,uint256).details: Returns all pending orders using a pagination systemCalls `getAllPendingOrdersForTraders` internally with all traders.

params._limit: index of last pendingOrder to return
params._offset: index of first pendingOrder to return

getAllPendingOrdersForTraders(address[],.details: Returns all pending orders using a pagination system

params._limit: index of last pendingOrder to return
params._offset: index of first pendingOrder to return
params._traders: list of traders to return pendingOrder for

getAllTradeInfos(uint256,uint256).details: Returns all trade infos of open trade/limit/stop orders using a pagination system.Calls `getAllTradeInfosForTraders` internally with all traders.

params._limit: index of last tradeInfo to return
params._offset: index of first tradeInfo to return

getAllTradeInfosForTraders(address[],uin.details: Returns all trade infos of open trade/limit/stop orders using a pagination system

params._limit: index of last tradeInfo to return
params._offset: index of first tradeInfo to return
params._traders: list of traders to return tradeInfo for

getAllTrades(uint256,uint256).details: Returns all trade/limit/stop orders using a pagination system.Calls `getAllTradesForTraders` internally with all traders.

params._limit: index of last trade to return
params._offset: index of first trade to return

getAllTradesForTraders(address[],uint256.details: Returns all trade/limit/stop orders using a pagination system

params._limit: index of last trade to return
params._offset: index of first trade to return
params._traders: list of traders to return trades for

getAllTradesLiquidationParams(uint256,ui.details: Returns all trade liquidation params of open trade/limit/stop orders using a pagination systemCalls `getAllTradesLiquidationParamsForTraders` internally with all traders.

params._limit: index of last liq param to return
params._offset: index of first liq param to return

getAllTradesLiquidationParamsForTraders(.details: Returns all trade liquidation params of open trade/limit/stop orders using a pagination system

params._limit: index of last liq param to return
params._offset: index of first liq param to return
params._traders: list of traders to return liq params for

params._index: the index of the supported collateral

getCollateralIndex(address).details: Returns the index of a supported collateral

getCollateralsCount().details: Returns the number of supported collaterals

getCounters(address,uint8).details: Returns the counters of a trader (currentIndex / open count for trades/tradeInfos and pendingOrders mappings)

getCountersForTraders(address[],uint8).details: Returns the counters for a list of traders

getGToken(uint8).details: Returns the address of the gToken for a collateral stack

params._collateralIndex: the index of the supported collateral

getGnsCollateralIndex().details: Returns the collateral index of the GNS token. If 0, GNS is not a collateral.

getLookbackFromBlock(address,uint32,uint.details: Returns the corresponding lookback fromBlock for a trigger

getPendingOrders(address).details: Returns all pending orders for a trader

params._index: index of the trade for trader

getTradeContractsVersion(address,uint32).details: Returns the contracts version for a trade

getTradeInfo(address,uint32).details: Returns trade info of an open trade/limit/stop order

params._index: index of the trade for trader

getTradeInfos(address).details: Returns all trade infos of open trade/limit/stop orders for a trader

getTradeLiquidationParams(address,uint32.details: Returns the liquidation params for a trade

params._index: index of the trade for trader

getTradePendingOrderBlock((address,uint3.details: Returns the block number of the pending order for a trade (0 = doesn't exist)

getTraderStored(address).details: Returns whether a trader is stored in the traders array

getTraders(uint32,uint32).details: Returns all traders that have open trades using a pagination system

params._limit: end index in the traders array
params._offset: start index in the traders array

getTradersCount().details: Returns the length of the traders array

getTrades(address).details: Returns all open trades/limit/stop orders for a trader

getTradesLiquidationParams(address).details: Returns all trade liquidation params of open trade/limit/stop orders for a trader

hasRole(address,uint8).details: Returns whether an account has been granted a particular role

hasRoles(address,uint8,uint8).details: Returns whether an account has been granted at least one of two roles

params._govEmergencyTimelock: address to be granted emergency timelock role

params._gnsStaking: address of the gns staking contract

isCollateralActive(uint8).details: Returns whether can open new trades with a collateral

params._index: the index of the collateral to check

isCollateralGns(uint8).details: Returns whether a collateral is the GNS token

params._index: the index of the collateral to check

isCollateralListed(uint8).details: Returns whether a collateral has been listed

params._index: the index of the collateral to check

setRoles(address[],uint8[],bool[]).details: Updates access control for a list of accounts

params._pendingOrder: the pending order to be stored

toggleCollateralActiveState(uint8).details: Toggles the active state of a supported collateral

updateGToken(address,address).details: Updates the contracts of a supported collateral trading stack

params._gToken: the gToken contract of the collateral

updateTradeMaxClosingSlippageP((address,.details: Updates an existing trade max closing slippage %

params._isPnlPositive: whether the pnl is positive (only relevant when closing)
params._pendingOrderType: corresponding pending order type (ignore dust OI delta for leverage updates, refresh trade liq params for partial adds)

updateTradeSl((address,uint32),uint64).details: Updates the stop loss of an open trade

updateTradeTp((address,uint32),uint64).details: Updates the take profit of an open trade

validateOpenTradeOrder((address,uint32,u.details: Validates an open trade order (for all order types apart from MARKET_OPEN)

params._orderType: the pending order type to validate
